description_long: This is a small, single-propeller airplane with a classic monoplane design, featuring a straight, low-mounted wing configuration. The fuselage is compact and streamlined, with a rounded nose housing a visible propeller at the front. The cockpit is positioned just behind the propeller, enclosed with a clear canopy, and appears to be a single-seat arrangement. The tail section includes a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, forming a standard tail assembly. The landing gear is fixed and consists of two main wheels under the wings and a smaller tail wheel. The exterior is primarily a dark green color with lighter accents, giving it a vintage or military trainer appearance.
description: A small, dark green single-propeller airplane with a low-wing design, enclosed cockpit, and fixed landing gear. The aircraft has a streamlined fuselage and a conventional tail assembly.
description_view_0: Front view showing the propeller, nose, and the straight low-mounted wings extending outward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the streamlined fuselage, enclosed cockpit, and fixed main and tail landing gear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail assembly with vertical and horizontal stabilizers, and the trailing edges of the wings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the fuselage, cockpit, and landing gear from the other side.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing monoplane with straight wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
